modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to disconnect VoIP line and stop billing charges.

full_description_text:  
I got an email about a VoIP phone line. The extension is not used by our department anymore. They want to disconnect it and stop the charges on the bill. Can we make this change?
short_description: Need to disconnect VoIP line and stop billing charges.
description: I got an email about a VoIP phone line. The extension is not used by our department anymore. They want to disconnect it and stop the charges on the bill. Can we make this change?
